captions.p4_grounded:
A spoon lifts white rice, bean sprouts, and sliced green onions from a light brown broth in a dark bowl. The liquid contains small red specks and more green onion rings.

Search keywords: food, meal, broth, soup, bowl, rice, bean sprouts, green onion, spoon, light brown liquid, dark bowl

A black pan contains a mixture of cooked meat and pale sprouts with yellow tips in a thick reddish-brown sauce. The pan sits on an orange surface next to a yellow metal frame and a silver can with Korean text.

A close-up shot shows a bubbling, reddish-orange stew in a dark pan. The stew contains flat, pale-yellow slices, thin white shredded pieces, and bits of green vegetables.

A black bowl contains a mound of orange-pink fish slices topped with small orange spheres and resting on white ice. Beside the fish are a dollop of light green paste, green sprouts, and shredded white pieces, all placed on a wooden table with a person holding chopsticks in the background.

Search keywords: food, meal, black bowl, orange-pink fish, orange spheres, light green paste, green sprouts, shredded white vegetables, white ice, wooden table, chopsticks.

An upside-down close-up photo of a man with curly brown hair and black-rimmed glasses. He is positioned in front of a grassy hillside with several white wind turbines in the distance under a bright sky.
